1.description: Get Trondheim municipality polygon and centroid

2.description: Fetch quick-clay release areas with class values (include list of distinct classes)

4.description: Filter quick-clay areas to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: Keep only high-risk quick-clay areas (class chosen after inspection)

6.description: Find buildings that intersect high-risk quick-clay areas

7.description: Compute distance from those buildings to municipality centroid

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(ST_Centroid(omrade), 4326)) AS centroid_geojson,
  ST_X(ST_Centroid(omrade)) AS centroid_x,
  ST_Y(ST_Centroid(omrade)) AS centroid_y
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim';

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(ST_Centroid(omrade), 4326)) AS centroid_geojson,

1.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
  ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(ST_Centroid(omrade), 4326)) AS centroid_geojson,
  ST_X(ST_Centroid(omrade)) AS centroid_x,
  ST_Y(ST_Centroid(omrade)) AS centroid_y
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim';

1.description: get Trondheim municipality number and centroid (use a relaxed name filter to avoid previous 0-row match)

2.description: select quick-clay hazard polygons with high risk class, prefilter by kommunenummer where possible

3.description: select building points in Trondheim (prefilter by kommunenummer where possible)

4.description: find buildings that intersect high-risk quick-clay polygons (buildings left, kvikkleire right, intersects)

5.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid returned in step 1

7.description: sort intersecting buildings by distance ascending (closest first)
